violations.description: Serial suite execution reduces throughput for CI shards and increases wall-clock runtime.
violations.suggestion: Refactor to parallel-safe test cases and remove serial mode where isolation is restored.

violations.description: E2E automation is constrained to serial mode, limiting concurrency gains.
violations.suggestion: Partition deterministic setup and run scenarios in parallel groups.

violations.description: Large multipurpose spec likely increases retry cost and diagnosis time when a single scenario fails.
violations.suggestion: Split heavy specs to improve execution granularity and rerun speed.

performance_metrics.avg_test_duration_estimate: ~20-60s per spec depending on fixture setup

recommendations: Target serial-to-parallel conversion for Epic F automate suites.
Reduce file size to lower retry blast radius.
Keep API setup minimal and shared through robust fixtures.
summary: Performance is acceptable but constrained by serial execution and oversized specs.
